rootCause: Normal UI evaluation was using full registry/experimental source, so an intentionally hidden experimental task could be classified as missing UI.
fixApplied: Documented as expected hidden in normal UI; evaluation script now uses /api/tasks/available without includeExperimental.
beforeBehavior: Could be treated as missing in normal UI evaluation despite registry_status experimental.
afterBehavior: Expected hidden in normal UI while experimental; not counted as UI bug.
notes: No product policy change; no code change to task behavior.

rootCause: Dry investigation found canonical student.disadvantage_score exists but has 0 non-null rows in both SAMPLE_OULAD and SAMPLE_UCI_POR; dataset-agnostic SQL would return 0 rows.
fixApplied: Documented as deferred/blocker; no SQL/capability/validator change applied.
method: Documentation only; defer to Phase 4 data feature work.
beforeBehavior: A-G09 current SQL hard-filters OULAD, but the required canonical score is not populated even for OULAD sample.
afterBehavior: A-G09 remains deferred until disadvantage_score is defined/populated and capability-gated.
notes: Do not add OULAD-only guard; do not add disadvantage_scoring yet; Phase 4 should populate canonical score first.
